headings.strategy: Bold, industrial yet premium sans-serif. Tracking tight. Never use Inter for headings.

body.strategy: Clean, highly readable sans-serif for data-dense bulk ordering and B2B tables.

mono.strategy: Use for SKUs, pricing data, and inventory alerts to align with the 'Industrial' feel.

layout_and_spacing.marketing_pages: Bento grids, generous spacing (p-12 to p-24), asymmetrical layouts for Hero and Featured Products.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_and_b2b: The 'Control Room' Grid. Strict hierarchy, dense data tables (p-4 to p-6). Full utilization of horizontal space for bulk requisition lists.
layout_and_spacing.borders_and_surfaces: Grid Borders (Technical Look) with 1px border-white/10. Avoid heavy drop shadows; rely on crisp 1px borders and slight background lightness variations for elevation.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp corners or rounded-sm. Primary buttons use Warm Gold (#D4AF37) with Dark Charcoal text. Hover state must maintain high contrast (e.g., hover:bg-[#e6c24d]).
components.cards: Minimalist, cardless approach where possible, or extremely flat surfaces with 1px border. No muddy gray shadows.
components.tables: Shadcn Table customized. Monospaced numbers for SKUs and Prices. Hover rows clearly highlighted in #2A2A2A.
components.inputs: Shadcn inputs with transparent background, #2A2A2A on focus, sharp gold ring on focus.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Subtle background shifts (e.g., bg-black/20 to bg-white/10) with crisp text color changes.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Fast and industrial (150ms ease-in-out). Avoid long floaty animations.
interactions_and_motion.loading: Skeleton loaders matching the dark charcoal theme, or monospaced text loaders (e.g., 'FETCHING SKUS...').

hero_background.description: Dimly lit restaurant kitchen featuring a chef at work, creating an intimate atmosphere.

product_category_1.description: Premium sliced meat on black wooden table

product_category_2.description: Close-up of wooden bowls with flour and almonds, surrounded by fresh spinach and eggs on a dark surface.

product_category_3.description: Close-up of organic matcha powder scattered on a dark background.

partner_logo_1.description: A vibrant retro Apple logo with rainbow colors on a sleek black background.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over dark backgrounds meets APCA standards. Use text-white for primary text, text-gray-400 for secondary.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs, tables) MUST include descriptive data-testid attributes (e.g., 'bulk-add-to-cart-button').
accessibility_and_testing.focus_rings: Highly visible focus rings (Warm Gold, ring-2) on all keyboard-navigable elements.

iconography.style: Crisp, 1.5px stroke width. Unfilled unless active. Technical and sharp.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme using #1A1A1A as the main background.
Implement the Layout using standard Tailwind CSS classes.
Install and use Chivo for all H1-H4 headings from Google Fonts (@import or next/font). Keep tracking tight.
Use Inter for body text and JetBrains Mono for SKUs, amounts, and numeric tabular data.
Implement Shadcn UI extensively for the B2B catalog, requisition lists, and admin dashboard.
Do NOT use HTML <select> or native <input type='date'>. Use Shadcn Dropdown/Select and Calendar.
Ensure the hero section uses the provided image with a max opacity bg-black/50 overlay to maintain visual richness.
For the Bulk Ordering / Requisition List, use a dense table layout (py-2 px-3 cells) with monospaced SKUs and input fields directly in the table rows for quick quantity adjustments.
